title: After the Arima Kinen: Ramen to Wash Down the Win

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, I'm starving. G1 races sure do give you
an appetite.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Man, I lost again! One salt ramen, please!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'll have soy sauce!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I really thought I was going to beat you today.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
We're at Nakayama Racecourse where the Arima
Kinen took place today. Tell me, who caught your
eye today?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser and Tokai Teio both ran
really well but, personally, I couldn't look away
from Nice Nature!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I could feel her energy even when she was in the
paddock. And she ran such a great race!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
She didn't win... but I can't wait to see what she
does next!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey! You hear that?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I guess I did do my best!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You were fantastic. I got shivers down my spine
mid-race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure that makes me feel any better,
considering you won and all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature stares at the ceiling for a while and
then slaps her cheeks for motivation.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm winning next time! First place's got my
name on it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's the spirit! Stay positive!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Where do you think I get it from?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, looks like my ramen's here! I'm gonna dig in
first!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Munch...Mmm! This is goo—huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Um, sorry. I think this one is actually yours.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Seriously?!
